data.title: Quantum Computing Inc.’s Q3 hits the red, even as revenue beats the street
data.description:
Quantum Computing Inc. dropped its third-quarter earnings report late Friday, and the company shocked analysts by delivering revenue that beat expectations while still reporting results that keep the business in the red. The company said it earned an adjusted profit of 1 cent for the September quarter, which flips the 6-cent loss recorded a year […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/quantum-computing-inc-s-q3-hits-the-red/

data.title: "Brother Machi" added 350 ETH to his long position in the past 8 hours, and his overall position is currently showing a floating loss of 195%.
data.description: Hyperinsight monitoring shows that Huang Licheng, known as "Maji Dage," just added 200 ETH to his long position, bringing his total long position to 350 ETH in the past 8 hours. Currently, his 25x leveraged long position in ETH is showing a floating loss of $1.925 million (-195%), with a total position of 7750 ETH and a position size of $24.6 million. The average entry price was $3422, and the liquidation price was $3047. Furthermore, he has placed limit orders for a total of 475 ETH in the $3188-$3400 range to close his long position.

data.title: Aster: The S4 buyback program is about to begin; the S3 buyback expenditure was nearly 49.3 million USDT.
data.description: Perpetual contract DEX Aster announced on the X platform that the S3 buyback program is nearing completion, with a total expenditure of 49,299,999 USDT and a total ASTER token buyback volume of 47,065,447. Aster also announced that the S4 buyback program will begin soon, with details on buyback fee allocation, dates, and addresses to be released shortly.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $492 million yesterday, marking the third consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $492 million yesterday (November 14th, Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF (BTC), with a net inflow of $4.1722 million. BTC's historical total net inflow has reached $1.677 billion. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the BlackRock ETF (IBIT), with a net outflow of $463 million. IBIT's historical total net inflow has reached $63.789 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $125.345 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.67%. Historical cumulative net inflows have reached $58.852 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $178 million yesterday, marking the fourth consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $178 million yesterday (November 14th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a net outflow of $173 million. ETHA's historical total net inflow has reached $13.449 billion. This was followed by Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE, with a single-day net outflow of $4.6306 million. ETHE's historical total net outflow has reached $4.885 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $19.999 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total Ethereum market capitalization) of 5.42%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $13.133 billion.

data.title: Gate Research: Primary market financing surged 104.8% in October, with capital heavily invested in prediction markets and stablecoin infrastructure.
data.description: According to the "October 2025 Web3 Funding Panorama" report released by Gate Research Institute, the Web3 funding market rebounded strongly in October, with 130 transactions completed and a total funding amount of $5.12 billion, a significant increase of 104.8% month-on-month, marking the second highest level in nearly a year. Strategic rounds dominated the funding structure in October, accounting for over 70%, driven by the explosion of prediction markets and the accelerated integration of CeFi and TradFi. Polymarket topped the list with $2 billion in strategic funding, marking a high point for the prediction market sector in terms of capital investment. CeFi maintained its expansion momentum through mergers and acquisitions and structured financing, continuously deepening its synergy with the traditional financial system. In terms of sectors, DeFi jumped to the top with $2.15 billion in total funding, reflecting the concentrated allocation of capital to innovative financial applications. Stablecoin infrastructure also became a focus, with Tempo completing a $500 million Series A funding round, further consolidating its strategic position as the underlying layer of Web3 finance. The distribution of financing amounts exhibits a pattern of "mid-sized projects dominating, with increasing polarization." Projects with financing amounts in the $3 million–$10 million range are the most active, accounting for over one-third; while smaller financings below $1 million account for only 5.9%, a recent low, indicating that capital is becoming increasingly selective in its screening of "purely conceptual" projects, with funds rapidly flowing towards mature teams and implemented solutions possessing long-term competitiveness. Overall, the Web3 financing landscape in October shows a triple trend of "capital return, structural reshaping, and confidence recovery," suggesting the industry is entering a new cycle driven by steady growth and real value creation.

data.title: Hakimi's market capitalization briefly surpassed $44 million, surging over 40% intraday.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of BSC Meme token Hakimi briefly exceeded $44 million, but has since fallen back to $36.87 million, representing a daily increase of over 40%. Odaily reminds users that Meme token prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: Czech National Bank buys USD 1 million in Bitcoin & crypto assets
data.description:
The Czech central bank is testing USD 1 million in Bitcoin and digital assets to evaluate custody, risks, and practical applicability. The article Czech National Bank buys USD 1 million in Bitcoin & crypto assets was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/hot-topics/news/czech-national-bank-buys-usd-1-million-in-bitcoin-crypto-assets/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=Czech+National+Bank+buys+USD+1+million+in+Bitcoin+%26%23038%3B+crypto+assets

data.title: Belarus’ Lukashenko presents crypto as alternative to US dollar
data.description:
The Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko has classified cryptocurrencies as one of the possible paths for the world to wean itself off dependence on the US dollar. The president’s remarks came while he was at a government meeting held to discuss the performance of the Belarusian Nuclear Power Plant, rising electricity consumption and proposals for new […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/belarus-lukashenko-crypto-alternative-dollar/

data.title: Santiment Report Suggests Unlikely Bottom for Cryptocurrency Market
data.description: According to PANews, Santiment, a platform specializing in cryptocurrency sentiment analysis, released a report on Saturday indicating that the likelihood of the cryptocurrency market reaching its bottom is low, despite predictions from numerous analysts and traders. The report advises caution when there is widespread consensus on a specific price bottom, noting that true market bottoms often form when the majority expect prices to continue declining.
